A.evidence: Faithful prose and section order through Alg.1; equations mostly clean, Alg.1 captured as single-column HTML rather than exact algorithm layout.

B.evidence: Good prose/math overall but section 2 heading is missing, Alg.1 flattened rather than boxed/table form, and a backprop derivative sign is wrong.

C.evidence: Raw bbox JSON is inserted into the text, reading order jumps from Alg.1 toward inference/Alg.2, and some intervening page-4 content is skipped.

D.evidence: Prose is mostly present but has OCR errors; Alg.1 is mangled with duplicated variance lines and missing mean, and many formulas are degraded.

E.evidence: Major reading-order damage: page-1 right column precedes Introduction, equations are misplaced, section 2 heading duplicated, and later text is hallucinated/duplicated.

F.evidence: Many equations and Alg.1 are replaced by formula-not-decoded placeholders, abstract appears after later prose, and table/algorithm structure is absent.

G.evidence: Output is dominated by huge repeated symbol/number garbage, equations are unusable, and reading order is largely broken.

H.evidence: Good prose/order and many equations, but Alg.1 is truncated to a broken array line with its rows missing; minor OCR word splits and odd citation links.
